events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess field condition: missing surge protection on field side. Work stage tested/inspected. Compare against loop drawings, ISA 5.1. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Missing surge protection likely non-compliant if required by drawings/spec. Since observed field condition is missing surge protection on field side. Need determine if fail. Risk? Surge protection missing can lead to instrument damage, spurious signals, safety issues. Medium/high? Field side surge protection often required for lightning/transient protection. If missing, installed-defective and non-compliant. Need include actions: install surge protection per drawing/spec, verify loop, retest. Rationale. References: loop drawings, ISA 5.1 maybe NEC? But only given references. Could mention OEM service info. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
